=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/26/02, Denver, CO, Pepsi Center, 2CDR

Unknown lineage. Great sound

DISC 1, 1. To Be Alone With You, 2. In the Summertime, 3. Tombstone Blues, 4. Accidentally Like a Martyr, 5. Watching The River Flow, 6. Brown Sugar, 7. Just Like a Woman, 8. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 9. The Lonesome Death of Hattie Carroll, 10. Cold Irons Bound, 11. The Times They are A-Changin', 12. Old Man, 13. Honest With Me
 
DISC 2, 1. I Shall Be Released, 2. High Water (For Charley Patton), 3. Mutineer, 4. Floater (Too Much To Ask), 5. Summer Days, 6. Encore cheer, 7. Blowin' in the Wind, 8. All Along the Watchtower


Bob plays piano on d1: 1-5, 8, and 13, and d2: 2-4. 
Bob and Charlie played the piano with their feet on d1: 13. 



Concert # 1471 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 18 of the 2002 US Fall Tour. 2002 concert # 88.
Concert # 72 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

8-9, 11, 12, 14, 19 acoustic with the band.
1-5, 8, 13, 15-17 Bob Dylan (piano).
2 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
5, 13 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
7, 16 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
2, 6, 12, 14, 19 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

Note. Dylan dedicated The Times They Are A-Changin' to the liberal Minnesota Senator Paul Wellstone, who was tragically killed in an airplane accident.


7 new songs (35%) compared to previous concert. 1 new song for this tour.
